Add patient info 
Patient is a 71 year old male with a history of new-onset CHF (NYHA Class II), HTN, and non-insulin dependent DM who presents with 3 days of dyspnea. He was initially diagnosed two months ago by his PCP after an echocardiogram revealed an EF of 45%.  He notes that the shortness of breath is worse at night and on exertion and improves when he uses an extra pillow. He denies PND. He also endorses mild mid-chest tight
